Venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya has criticized Warren Buffett's long-standing advice to invest in S&P 500 index funds, warning of a "rude awakening" for investors. He contends this concentration contradicts the principle of diversification, potentially leaving average investors vulnerable to significant losses if these tech giants underperform.
